name: Pork Chop Rhubarb Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the pork chops in oil; season with salt and pepper. Remove to a platter.
2. Mix 1/4 cup pan drippings with bread crumbs. Reserve 1/2 cup.
3. Sprinkle remaining crumbs into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
4. Combine rhubarb, sugar, flour, and cinnamon in a bowl.
5. Spoon half of the rhubarb mixture over the bread crumbs.
6. Arrange pork chops on top.
7. Spoon remaining rhubarb mixture over the chops.
8. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
9. Remove foil, sprinkle remaining crumbs.
10. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
